items.title: SpatialGen Zeus Streams Live Immersive Video To Apple Vision Pro
items.excerpt: SpatialGen Zeus is a rack-mounted system for live immersive video workflows on Apple Vision Pro, ingesting, encoding and distributing high-quality ProRes spatial video in real time.

items.title: Meta Preempts Google's Gentle Monster Glasses With Kylie Jenner 'Starfire' Design
items.excerpt: Meta released 'Starfire' smart glasses designed with Kylie Jenner, featuring her voice for Meta AI and premium industrial-design styling on the same core tech as Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2.

items.title: Meta Launches Cheaper Smart Glasses Without Ray-Ban Branding
items.excerpt: Meta introduced a new line of affordable smart glasses with the same wearable-AI interface as Ray-Ban Meta but without premium branding, starting at $300 in two styles.

items.title: Is AI creating a divide among creatives?
items.excerpt: Over half of creatives now use AI in their workflows, but adoption skews toward those who can afford to take the risk, opening a divide in how design teams work.

items.title: What's actually in the world's first AI art museum?
items.excerpt: Dataland, founded by digital artists Refik Anadol and Efsun Erkilic, opens as the world's first AI art museum with immersive, generative living artworks across five galleries.

items.title: Miris Built a Car Configurator Without Pixel Streaming: Here's What They Found
items.excerpt: Miris built an interactive WebXR car configurator that streams HDR-grade material fidelity at minimal file sizes, with no cloud GPU or pixel streaming required.
